text.title: ai-powered-pm-tools Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-powered-pm-tools as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Building core PM automation on Jira Rovo agents, Monday Agent Factory, or ClickUp Autopilot without a migration path.
failure-mode.detector: Filled artefact, log, or vendor dashboard exhibits the pattern described in the parent description (e.g. velocity claims from non-calibrated baseline, mixed-model outputs without label, niche-domain breakdowns without per-domain calibration).
failure-mode.repair: These are proprietary agent platforms not exportable to other tools; if the vendor changes pricing or deprecates the feature, the automation must be rebuilt from scratch on a new platform.
